summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DiscoveryTrackAI backend API endpoints for discovery data persistence. All backend functionality working correctly. Frontend loads properly but has UI interaction issues preventing full end-to-end testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Eye icon buttons in Actions column are not clickable - appear to have overlay or visibility issues
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents navigation to customer detail pages, blocking discovery questionnaire functionality

passed_tests: Backend: Customer CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend: GET /api/customers/{id}/discovery returns empty discovery data correctly
Backend: PUT /api/customers/{id}/discovery saves discovery data successfully
Backend: GET /api/customers/{id}/discovery returns saved data correctly
Backend: PUT /api/customers/{id}/discovery updates existing data successfully
Backend: Discovery endpoints handle nonexistent customers with 404
Frontend: Main dashboard page loads correctly
Frontend: Customers table displays with proper data
Frontend: Page structure and layout appear correct
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix customer view button clickability issue in Actions column. The eye icons are visible but not responding to clicks, preventing navigation to customer detail pages where discovery questionnaire functionality can be tested.

success_percentage.backend: 100% (16/16 API tests passed including new discovery endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 60% (dashboard loads, customers display, but navigation blocked by UI issue)
